titleStmt.title: SII 16.63: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 63. (A.R. No. 336 of 1915.) CHĒJERLA, NARASAROWPET TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a Nandi-pillar set up near the dhvaja-staṁbha of the Kapōtēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1440 (current), Īśvara, Māgha ba. 14, Monday, corresponding to 1518 A.D., February 9, which was Tuesday.

The record is damaged and seems to register a gift of the various levies such as suṅkam, talārikam etc., of Biṭṭalāpuram alias Kapōtapuram in Chēṁjerla to god Kapōtēśvara-mahādēva who favoured king Śibi, for worship of the deity and records the construction of the tanks Timmasamudram and Koṇḍasamudram by Rāyasam Koṇḍamarusayya, son of Sāḷuva Timmarasayya and Śriṁgāyamma. Mentions Sāḷuva Timmarusayya as the Śiraḥ-pradhāni of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu .
śētussītasu
mērurakṣitama
hī śrīkṛṣṇarā
yā¨rpitaṁ . sva
sti śrīśakava¨rṣaṁbu
lu 1440 Agunēṁ
ṭi yīśvara saṁvva
tsara māgha ba 14
sō . śrī rājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśva
ra Aṣṭadikkurāja
manōbhayaṁ
kara mūrurā
yaragaṁḍḍa Ari
rāyavibhāḍa
muktātulārō
haṇa śōḍaśama
hādānapracaṁ
ḍḍa saṁttata kamaḷa
vasaṁtta tyāgala
kṣmīnivāsa catu
ssamudrādhīśvara
śrīvīrapratāpa śrī
kṛṣṇadēvamahā
rāyalu pṛthvī
rājyaṁ śēyu
cuṁḍaṁgānu
Ā rāyala siraḥ
pradhānulaina sā
ḷuva tiṁmmaru
sayya rāyasa
ṁ koṁḍḍamaru
sayyaṁgāru .
Āryānāṁthasa
paryamaryādayā
dhuryaparyāya śrī
parvata . kālakaṁ
ṭha līlāvinō
da bhūlōkakailā
sācala śṛṁgga

naprā¨rthitābhī
ṣṭakāmēśvara va
raprasāda labda
caturaṁkarakṣi
ta pu
ṇyēnānaṁtakō
ṭicatussahasra
prasiddhadivyaliṁ
gga catuṣkaṁbhavi
jṛṁbhaṇavibhaṁjana
ga kṣi prada
mai mōdaṭi kailā
samaina kapōtēśva
ramaṁddunu rā
yasaṁ koṁḍḍa
marusayyaṁ
gāru tamatalli
śriṁgāyaṁma
ṁgārikiṁni ta
mataṁḍri tiṁma
rusayyaṁgāri
kiṁni puṇyaṁgā
nu
much damaged
patikṣētrapāla
ka sthānāluṁnu
damaged

dakṣiṇakāśi
kṣētra . ṣaṣṭi bi
lēśvarōdbhava na
ṁdīśvaramaṁdi
ra śrīcēruṁje
¨rlla mānyasā
na śibirāja va
rada śrīdivyaliṁgē
śvaranāma śrī sva
yaṁbhu śrīma
trpasaṁna śrīkapō
tēśvara śrīmanma
hādēvadēvuni ma
hima teliya vi
ṁnapaṁ cēśi Anā
disiddhamai sāgiva
ccē cēṁje¨rllanu
biṭṭalāpurama
nē kapōtapuramu
ṁnu suṁka talā
rikālu go(¨r)llā
kārālu kānika
gaḍāyālu veṭi
vēmulu sahā nū
ru muṭṭi vacci cha
trisāvēdanallunnu
dēvuni Aṁgaraṁga
vaibhavālakuṁnnu
vacceyaṭṭugānu
yī reṁḍugrāmā
luṁnnu sa¨rvvamā
nyaṁ śēyiṁcci
dēvuni paścimāna
nu tana taṁḍripēra tiṁma
samudramunnu
tanapēra tū¨rpu
na koṁḍasamudra
muṁnu ni¨rmiṁ
cci vēyiṁcina dha
¨rmaśāsana kaṁbha
mu śrīśrīśrī .
